name: Tough Rubber Balloon Plush Dog Toy - Boots & Barkley™ Red
description:
Your furry friend will have tons of fun playing with the Tough Rubber Balloon Plush Dog Toy from Boots & Barkley™. Shaped like a classic red balloon puppy, this dog toy is made from tough rubber to give them hours of fun. Showcasing a soft plush construction, this tough rubber dog toy is designed for fetching, chewing, and hours of tail-wagging playtime.

Boots & Barkley™: Because pets are just the best.

100% satisfaction guaranteed or your money back.
